name: Soul of the Supreme Celestial King
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>覇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たましい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Soul of the Supreme King Celestial Dragon
desc: Tribute 1 Spellcaster Pendulum Monster with 2500 original ATK; Fusion Summon 1 "Supreme King Z-ARC" from your Extra Deck by banishing Fusion Materials mentioned on it from your hand, Deck, Extra Deck, field, and/or GY, but negate its effects unless at least 1 each of your "Pendulum Dragon", "Xyz Dragon", "Synchro Dragon", and "Fusion Dragon" monsters are currently banished. You can only activate 1 "Soul of the Supreme Celestial King" per turn.
eff: Tribute 1 Spellcaster Pendulum Monster with 2500 original ATK; Fusion Summon 1 "Supreme King Z-ARC" from your Extra Deck by banishing Fusion Materials mentioned on it from your hand, Deck, Extra Deck, field, and/or GY, but negate its effects unless at least 1 each of your "Pendulum Dragon", "Xyz Dragon", "Synchro Dragon", and "Fusion Dragon" monsters are currently banished. You can only activate 1 "Soul of the Supreme Celestial King" per turn.

action: Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Deck as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Extra Deck as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
